ohtani.title: Dodgers use 10-run 7th to power past Pirates
ohtani.blurb: Andy Pages homers and Freddie Freeman collects his 2,500th career hit as the Dodgers use a 10-run 7th to rally past the Pirates, 12-3

imanaga.title: Craig Counsell recaps Cubs' comeback victory
imanaga.blurb: Craig Counsell talks about Shota Imanaga's start, the inside-the-park home run, and the Cubs' 9th inning comeback to win the game

suzuki.title: Goodman, Tovar, Carrigg fuel Rockies' 7-3 victory
suzuki.blurb: Hunter Goodman and Ezequiel Tovar both crush homers, plus Cole Carrigg triples during his MLB debut in the Rockies' 7-3 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Ben Williamson's RBI double lifts Rays in 4-3 win
yoshida.blurb: Ben Williamson hits a clutch RBI double and Nick Martinez tosses seven strong innings in the Rays' 4-3 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Cease, Valenzuela propel Blue Jays in walk-off win
okamoto.blurb: Dylan Cease strikes out 11 and Brandon Valenzuela hits a walk-off single in the Blue Jays' 3-2 win over the Phillies

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Sal Stewart's go-ahead homer leads Reds to 5-3 win
matsui.blurb: Sal Stewart hits a go-ahead homer in the 11th and Chase Burns strikes out seven batters to lead the Reds to a 5-3 win over the Padres
